productDisplayName: Tonino Lamborghini Men Forza EDT Perfume
description: Tonino Lamborghini Forza EDT perfume comes in a dark, mystical flaconThe fragrance opens with bergamot, pepper, juper berries, cypress, cumin and lemon leavesThe base notes add patchouli, vetiver and sandalwoodComes with a free Tonino Lamborghini Forza EDT perfume
